dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7292 IH: To amend the National Quantum Initiative Act to require a biennial report on the progress of the Subcommittee on Quantum Information Science of the National Science and Technology Council in implementing the national workforce strategic plan, and for other purposes.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Lawler (for himself and Mr. Riley of New York) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Science, Space, and Technology

form.official-title: To amend the National Quantum Initiative Act to require a biennial report on the progress of the Subcommittee on Quantum Information Science of the National Science and Technology Council in implementing the national workforce strategic plan, and for other purposes.

section.header: Biennial reports on progress of the Subcommittee on Quantum Information Science in implementing the national workforce strategic plan
section.text: Subsection (f) of section 103 of the National Quantum Initiative Act (15 U.S.C. 8813) is amended by adding at the end the following new sentences: The chairpersons shall biennially submit to the President, the Advisory Committee, and the appropriate committees of Congress a report on the progress of the Subcommittee in implementing the relevant strategic plan developed under subsection (e) and any updates thereto. Each such report shall include a description of such progress and of any challenges encountered, as well as any planned updates to address evolving workforce needs..
